business.name: Bella's Bistro
business.oneLiner: A neighbourhood trattoria serving wood-fired pizza and hand-rolled pasta in the heart of the old town.

signature: Every plate leaves the kitchen the way we'd serve it to family.

services.title: Wood-fired pizza
services.blurb: Blistered, 90-second Neapolitan crusts, straight from the oven.

services.title: Fresh pasta
services.blurb: Rolled, cut, and cooked to order every single day.

services.title: Private dining
services.blurb: A candle-lit back room for up to 30 of your favourite people.

testimonial.quote: The best carbonara this side of Rome — worth the wait every single time.
testimonial.author: The Weekend Food Review
